creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
MoinMoin 1.9.5 is out [1].

Fix: 

The patch at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/moinmoin/1.9.4-to-1.9.5.diff
works for me.  It was tested at our Tinderbox -- builds are fine, and
currently working at our corporate Wiki -- no problems were spotted.

QA page: http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/qa/www/moinmoin/1.9.5
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at
[1] http://moinmo.in/MoinMoinDownload
